response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, experienced engineer with 15+ years across full-stack, mobile, and distributed systems, excellent software fundamentals, and demonstrated leadership at Staff/Principal levels. However, this Principal-level role is specifically built around experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, and growth measurement systems—domains entirely absent from his resume. He has zero demonstrated experience with feature flagging, experimentation design, metrics infrastructure, or A/B testing frameworks. While his core engineering capabilities are solid, the specialized nature of this role at the Principal level, where deep domain expertise and hands-on productivity are required from day one, makes him a poor fit despite his overall strength.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience with multiple Staff/Principal-level roles demonstrating architectural leadership and ability to design systemic solutions across companies

Strong programming language match (JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Java, C#) and proven ability to select appropriate technologies; experienced with high-scale systems handling millions of requests per second
Excellent software engineering fundamentals including TDD, CI/CD, distributed systems, and demonstrated mentoring through workshops, courses, and open-source libraries
concerns: Zero experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or rollout infrastructure—the core focus of this Principal-level role
No demonstrated background in growth measurement, metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, statistical analysis, or experimentation methodology and bias detection
Missing Python language proficiency and no evidence of data-driven decision making or measurement-driven development in resume

key_factors.factor: Experimentation and growth platform domain expertise
Overall engineering seniority and technical fundamentals
Programming language and distributed systems match
